body_preview: - `yyds state why last-failure` timed out at 15s during Day 122 preflight self-test (Assessment §Self-Test Results). The command reads the full 63K-line `.yoyo/state/events.jsonl` (67.9MB) without any sampling or limit. - The same read-everything timeout pattern was fixed in `state doctor` (Day 117) and `state crashes` (Day 122) by adding sampling caps. - `b
expected_evidence: `yyds state why last-failure` completes within 15 seconds Task lineage shows file edits in src/commands_state.rs Self-test report shows one fewer timeout in the diagnostic command list Implementation: In `src/commands_state.rs`, find where `build_why_report` loads events for the "last-failure" search path. Add a sampling cap: read only the most recent N even
title: Fix `yyds state why last-failure` timeout — add event sampling cap
